channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: All 50 states now have gas prices above $4 a gallon
item.description: All 50 states have average gas prices above $4 a gallon, AAA said Wednesday, with seven topping $5 a gallon. The war with Iran continues to impact prices.

item.title: Taiwan continues amid Xi's warnings and Trump's mixed signals
item.description: In Taipei, analysis follows Xi Jinping's warning to Trump on Taiwan and Trump's inconsistent response.

item.title: Rubio proposes a new relationship with Cuba
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio delivered a Spanish-language video message for Cuban Independence Day, assigning blame...

item.title: Google overhauls search as AI competitors emerge
item.description: Google is transforming its search engine, its main revenue source, in response to rising AI competition.
